title: Flexible Controller Escalation
description: A lower-privileged controller party is allowed to arbitrarily reassign their own role to another party. This effectively grants that party unauthorized power over the contract's lifecycle.
recommendation: Require the contract signatory or owner to authorize reassignments of roles.

oracle.description: Reassignment of controllers should be signed by an owner.
oracle.static_signal: A controller choice mutates its own controller field without asserting the original signatory's consent.
oracle.symbolic_property: forall c. executes(ReassignDelegate, c) => signed_by(owner, c)
